title: CARTOON Pencil Case 3 Zip Complete 44 Pieces for School Multi-Compartment Pens Pencils Colours Markers Giotto, Tinker Bell, 20 x 13 x 6 cm, Pencil Cases
features: The Tinker Bell Fairy Peter Pan Multi Compartment Pencil Case is a charming and functional accessory, perfect for students looking to add a touch of fairy magic to their school routine. With its adorable design and bright colours, this pencil case is ideal for organizing everything you need for school.

The first compartment includes stationery for writing and drawing, a pencil, a red pen, a blue pen, an eraser, a sharpener, a ruler, a plastic scissors (designed to be safe for children), a table with the diagram of the hours and days of the week where you can write down the school timetable.
In the second compartment you will find 18 Disney crayons and in the third 18 coloured pens marked Giotto Turbo Color, ideal for creative and artistic activities.

With a size of 20 x 13 x 6 cm, the pencil case is compact enough to fit easily in your backpack, but large enough to hold everything you need for school. This multi-compartment pencil case from Tinker Bell is the perfect accessory for any young student who loves the world of Peter Pan and wants to combine practicality and beauty.
description: The Tinker Bell Fairy Peter Pan Multi Compartment Pencil Case is a charming and functional accessory, perfect for students looking to add a touch of fairy magic to their school routine. With its adorable design and bright colours, this pencil case is ideal for organizing everything you need for school. The cover of the pencil case features Tinker Bell on a pink gradient background decorated with sparkling stars, evoking a fairy and dreamy atmosphere. Pink and teal dominate the design of the pencil case, creating a sweet but elegant colour combination. Made from high quality materials, the pencil case is designed to last and withstand everyday use and is divided into three compartments each with a sturdy zip closure, ensuring safety and separation of the material contained. The first compartment includes stationery for writing and drawing, a pencil, a red pen, a blue pen, an eraser, a sharpener, a ruler, a plastic scissors (designed to be safe for children), a chart with the schedule of the hours and days of the week where you can write down the school timetable. In the second compartment you will find 18 Disney crayons and in the third 18 coloured pens marked Giotto Turbo Color, ideal for creative and artistic activities. With a size of 20 x 13 x 6 cm, the pencil case is compact enough to fit easily in your backpack, but large enough to hold everything you need for school. This multi-compartment pencil case from Tinker Bell is the perfect accessory for any young student who loves the world of Peter Pan and wants to combine practicality and beauty. With its enchanting design and well-organized content, this pencil case adds a touch of magic to the school day, inspiring creativity and imagination with every opening. Dimensions: 20 x 13 x 6 cm.
